message:
fix: resolve clippy warnings in ftui-render, ftui-layout, ftui-widgets

- ftui-render/diff.rs: remove unnecessary usize->usize cast
- ftui-layout/lib.rs: remove unused last_weighted_pos variable and
  prefix unused cache/id destructured bindings with underscore
- ftui-widgets/textarea.rs: remove redundant usize casts on
  last_viewport_height.get()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
